hero.headline: Web & Android developer,
hero.sub: Not a portfolio template. An experiment space: progress, process, and projects displayed through visual patterns that feel more like instruments than an introduction page.
about.label: Origin signal · 03
about.headline: Hi, I'm
about.name: Bimo Alfarrabi.
about.bio.1: I'm a developer — Laravel on the back-end, React/Vue/Blade on the front-end, and Kotlin for Android. Laravel is my go-to not because it's trendy, but because I know it well and it's proven productive for most web projects. I enjoy building websites that look good, feel alive, and ship on time.
about.bio.2: What I'm after isn't the most complete skill set, but a sensible workflow, clean design, and projects that actually get finished.
about.hover.desktop: Hover here to reveal the profile silhouette

about.hover.touch.hide: Tap again to hide the silhouette

collab.headline: Got a signal
collab.desc: Have a project, collaboration, or idea worth testing? Send the signal. I'm open to interesting conversations.

collab.form.note: Sent to my email + logged in Mission Control.
collab.error: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

constellation.headline: Skills, projects, and tools
constellation.desc: Not a long bio, not a hard CV. Just a quick map showing what's connected in the way I work.
orbit.headline: Public builds and private systems,
orbit.desc: One orbit for public work, one orbit for private work. Same structure, different access.
orbit.open.subcopy: My public builds, experiments, and reusable work I've opened up for viewing.
orbit.closed.subcopy: Client work, internal systems, and private builds that stay under mission control.

modal.stack.note: Stack chosen to support workflow, performance, and ease of project maintenance.
